case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS. HIGH TEK USA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-14-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN--MANAGER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM NICOLE CRAIG.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN--MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NICOLE CRAIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $185.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT HIGH TEK USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2013 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (O.D. BROWN - AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT HIGH TEK USA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (UNCLAIMED) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HIGH TEK USA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HIGH TEK USA, INC. DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF JURISDICATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395.5 AND CCP 116.370. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
